tool.name: tmux_interactive
tool.description:
Persistent tmux session for interactive security tools that take over the shell.
Unlike the regular `terminal_execute` tool which wraps commands with a PS1 marker for completion detection, this tool creates a long-lived tmux pane that runs an interactive tool (msfconsole, sliver-client, sqlmap --wizard, evil-winrm, hydra --pause, wpscan, mysql, psql, ipython, pdb, ftp, telnet, etc.) and lets you drive it step-by-step like a human operator.
Each session has a configurable prompt regex — either passed explicitly via `prompt_regex` or auto-detected from the launch command (built-in profiles for msfconsole, sliver, sqlmap, hydra, evil-winrm, python, ipython, pdb, mysql, psql, redis, mongo, ftp, telnet, smbclient, wpscan, rlwrap). After each `send`, the session blocks until the prompt reappears, so you can reliably chain commands.
Use this tool when terminal_execute would hang because the target process does not produce a bash PS1.
tool.details:
Session names are per-agent and must be unique within an agent. Up to 8 concurrent interactive sessions per agent.
Typical workflow for msfconsole: 1. tmux_interactive(action="start", name="msf", command="msfconsole -q") 2. tmux_interactive(action="send", name="msf", text="use exploit/multi/http/apache_normalize_path_rce_cve_2021_41773") 3. tmux_interactive(action="send", name="msf", text="set RHOSTS 10.0.0.5") 4. tmux_interactive(action="send", name="msf", text="set LHOST 10.0.0.1") 5. tmux_interactive(action="send", name="msf", text="run", wait_for_prompt_after_send=false) 6. tmux_interactive(action="wait", name="msf", pattern="Meterpreter session \\d+ opened", timeout=120) 7. tmux_interactive(action="read", name="msf", lines=50) 8. tmux_interactive(action="kill", name="msf")
Typical workflow for sqlmap interactive: 1. tmux_interactive(action="start", name="sqlmap_wiz", command="sqlmap --wizard") 2. tmux_interactive(action="send", name="sqlmap_wiz", text="https://target.com/?id=1") 3. tmux_interactive(action="send", name="sqlmap_wiz", text="1") 4. tmux_interactive(action="send", name="sqlmap_wiz", text="1") ... etc.
For Python REPL debugging: 1. tmux_interactive(action="start", name="py", command="python3") 2. tmux_interactive(action="send", name="py", text="import requests") 3. tmux_interactive(action="send", name="py", text="r = requests.get('https://target/api')") 4. tmux_interactive(action="send", name="py", text="print(r.status_code, len(r.text))") 5. tmux_interactive(action="kill", name="py")
Sending raw keys (no newline): action="key", key="C-c" to interrupt, "Up"/"Down" for history, "Tab" for completion.

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: One of: start, send, key, read, wait, kill, list

parameter.name: name
parameter.description: Session name (required for start, send, key, read, wait, kill). Per-agent unique identifier.

parameter.name: command
parameter.description: Command to launch in the new pane (required for start). Examples: `msfconsole -q`, `sliver`, `sqlmap --wizard`, `python3`, `mysql -h host -u user -p`.

parameter.name: text
parameter.description: Line of text to send as input (used with action=send). Enter is appended automatically.

parameter.name: key
parameter.description: Raw key to send without Enter (used with action=key). Tmux key names: C-c, C-d, C-z, Enter, Escape, Tab, BSpace, Up, Down, Left, Right, Home, End, PageUp, PageDown, F1-F12.

parameter.name: pattern
parameter.description: Regex to wait for in the buffer (used with action=wait). If omitted, waits for the session's prompt regex to reappear.

parameter.name: prompt_regex
parameter.description: Custom prompt regex to override auto-detection (used with action=start). Applied as multiline. If omitted and the command matches a known tool (msfconsole, sliver, sqlmap, etc.), the appropriate built-in regex is used.

parameter.name: work_dir
parameter.description: Starting working directory for the pane. Default: /workspace.

parameter.name: wait_for_prompt_after_send
parameter.description: If true (default), action=send blocks until the prompt reappears. Set to false for commands that do not return to prompt immediately (e.g., `run` in msfconsole), then use action=wait with a pattern.

parameter.name: lines
parameter.description: Tail last N lines from the buffer (used with action=read). 0 = full buffer.

parameter.name: timeout
parameter.description: Max seconds to wait for prompt or pattern. Default 30.

returns.description: Success flag, current buffer, at_prompt indicator, matched flag (for wait), and session info (alive, uptime_sec, prompt_regex).
